rubric.en:
**Q1** (nullp): What happens when you try the compilation&execution of the next program? (Output or error for the first code snippet)
**Q2** (nullp): What claims are true about the following class diagrams?
**Q3** (nullp): Which one of the following lambda expression captures local variables with references?
**Q4** (nullp): What keyword can we use to make the data of a class accessible from the derived class but not from outside it?
**Q5** (nullp): What value should we provide to a pointer if we want to make it null?
**Q6** (nullp): What happens when you try the compilation&execution of the next program on x64? (Output or error for the second code snippet)
**Q7** (nullp): Choose the C++ that correctly implement the diagram.
**Q8** (nullp): What happens when you try the compilation&execution of the next program? (Output or error for the third code snippet)
**Q9** (nullp): What will be printed on the screen when the next program is executed?
**Q10** (nullp): What happens when you try the compilation&execution of the next program? (Output or error for the fourth code snippet)
rubric.ro:
**Q1** (nullp): Ce se intampla cand se incearca compilarea&executia urmatorului program?
**Q2** (nullp): Care afirmații sunt adevărate despre următoarea diagramă de clase?
**Q3** (nullp): Care dintre urmatoarele expresii lambda capteaza variabilele locale prin referinta ?
**Q4** (nullp): Ce cuvant cheie putem utilizat pentru a face datele unei clase accesibile din clasa derivata dar nu si din afara ei ?
**Q5** (nullp): Cu trebuie sa folosim daca vrem sa creem un pointer null ?
**Q6** (nullp): Ce se intampla cand se incearca compilarea&executia urmatorului program pe x64?
**Q7** (nullp): Alegeți dintre descrierile C++ de mai jos implementează corect diagrama de clase din figură.
**Q8** (nullp): Ce se intampla cand se incearca compilarea&executia urmatorului program?
**Q9** (nullp): Ce va afisa urmatorul program la executie ?
**Q10** (nullp): Ce se intampla cand se incearca compilarea&executia urmatorului program?
